title: Monke PVP
description: A Minecraft PVP texture pack for 1.8.9
body:
A resource pack I made a long time ago, when I used to play in 1.8.9 for the old combat. I revisited the old versions recently and stumbled upon this resource pack I made by combining other resource packs I used to like at the time and it turned out pretty nicely. I still play with it when I go back to the older Minecraft versions every now and then and I though to release it, since others will probably enjoy it too.

If you want me to port it to the latest version or report some issues, you can do that in the comments of the video.

Pack showcase video on my channel:
